title: urena lobata var. yunnanensis
intro: Urena lobata var. yunnanensis, also known as Yunnan Sicklepod, is a variety of the Urena lobata plant, a type of annual herb that belongs to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Urena lobata var. yunnanensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
